title: arrabidaea bilabiata
intro: Arrabidaea bilabiata, also known as the "butterfly flower," is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Traditionally, the herb can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
